name: Jakarta (Special Capital Region of Indonesia)

colors.symbolism: the gold of the central emblem
from the elements of the emblem
from the elements of the emblem
from the wreath of the emblem

description: A blue field charged centrally with the coat of arms of the Special Capital Region of Jakarta — a stylised National Monument within a wreath bearing the motto 'Jaya Raya'.
history: Adopted by the Jakarta Provincial Government as the flag of the Daerah Khusus Ibukota (Special Capital Region) of Jakarta.

features.role: Coat of arms of the Special Capital Region of Jakarta — a stylised National Monument (Monas) within a rice-and-cotton wreath surrounded by the motto 'Jaya Raya'
features.symbolism: Monas (the National Monument) — Jakarta's central landmark; the rice and cotton represent prosperity
